examples.predicted_answer: southern part of the Northern Territory
between Jordan and Israel, with the West Bank to the west
southern part of the Northern Territory, Australia
Financial District of Lower Manhattan, New York

discussion: Reflexion helps when the first attempt stops after the first hop or drifts to a wrong second-hop entity, guided by reflection memory. The tradeoff is higher attempts, token cost from multiple LLM calls, and increased latency. The local endpoint handled formatting fine, indicating that small LLMs can be utilized for reflection.
